name: photon_integration
description: Integrates Canvas prescribing with Photon Health. Adds a 'Send via Photon' option to the Prescribe, Refill, and Adjust Prescription commands (removing Canvas's send / sign-and-send actions), syncs the patient to Photon via the backend M2M token, and provides a patient-chart 'Prescribe via Photon' app that opens Photon Elements so an authenticated provider can write the prescription and place the order.

handlers.description: Adds the 'Send via Photon' field to the Prescribe, Refill, and Adjust Prescription commands.
Removes send and sign-and-send actions from Prescribe when 'Send via Photon' is set.
Removes send and sign-and-send actions from Refill when 'Send via Photon' is set.
Removes send and sign-and-send actions from Adjust Prescription when 'Send via Photon' is set.
Blocks commit when 'Send via Photon' is set but the command can't be honored (invalid dispense unit, or a pharmacy is selected).
On sign of a 'Send via Photon' command, pre-syncs the patient to Photon (M2M); surfaces sync failures as a Canvas Task.
Serves the Photon Elements modal and the API-direct send modal (HTML/JS/CSS), and resolves the patient's Photon id.
Note-footer 'Send to Photon' button that opens the API-direct send modal.

applications.name: Prescribe via Photon
applications.description: Open Photon Elements to prescribe for this patient with an authenticated provider.
